response.justification: Despite extensive experience in software development, the candidate lacks relevant Java-focused project experience, has only basic German language skills (a hard requirement for client collaboration in Germany), and holds senior-level titles inconsistent with an entry-level role, suggesting misalignment with both technical and linguistic requirements.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across multiple languages and platforms
Strong open-source contributions and technical workshop leadership
Demonstrated proficiency in agile practices and CI/CD infrastructure
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, not sufficient for client-facing roles
No clear Java project experience despite listing it as a skill
Senior-level employment history contradicts entry-level role expectations
